title: US military says blockade of Iran ports 'completely' halts economic trade
snippet: In less than 36 hours since implementation, US forces have 'completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea,' says CENTCOM Commander Admiral Brad Cooper. 10,000+ sailors, Marines, Air Force personnel deployed. 6 merchant ships turned back in first 24 hours. No ships have made it past blockade.
tag_reason: CENTCOM의 '봉쇄 완전 시행(fully implemented)' 공식 선언은 4/15 신규. 이전 보도는 봉쇄 시작(4/13) 및 유조선 통과(4/14)였으나, 완전 차단 선언은 처음.
